data.biography: Lukman Sardi (born in Jakarta, July 14, 1971) is an Indonesian actor and director. He is famous as a character in his films. He is also the son of Zerlita and Idris Sardi, the legendary Indonesian violin musician. Idris Sardi then got married to Marini, so Lukman was the half-brother of the singer Shelomita.
data.name: Lukman Sardi

data.biography: 卢克曼·萨迪（Lukman Sardi）是爪哇布吉人血统的印度尼西亚演员。他是印度尼西亚小提琴家伊德里斯·萨尔迪（Idris Sardi）的儿子，也是印度尼西亚女演员哈迪查（Hadidjah）的孙子。
data.name: 卢克曼·萨尔迪

data.biography: 盧克曼·薩迪（路克曼·沙第）是爪哇布吉人血統的印度尼西亞演員。他是印度尼西亞小提琴家伊德里斯·薩爾迪（Idris Sardi）的兒子，也是印度尼西亞女演員哈迪查（Hadidjah）的孫子。
data.name: 路克曼·沙第

data.biography: Abbi Jacobson is an American comedian, writer, actress, illustrator and producer. She co-created and co-starred in the Comedy Central series Broad City (2014–2019) with Ilana Glazer, based on the web series of the same name. Her other roles include voicing Katie Mitchell in The Mitchells vs. the Machines (2021), Nya in The Lego Ninjago Movie (2017), and Princess Bean in the series Disenchantment (2018–2023), in addition to appearing in the live-action films Person to Person (2017) and 6 Balloons (2018).
data.name: Abbi Jacobson

data.biography: 艾比·雅各布森（Abbi Jacobson）是美国喜剧演员、作家、女演员、插画家和制片人。
data.name: 艾比·雅各布森

data.biography: Η Άμπι Τζέικομπσον (Abbi Jacobson) είναι Αμερικανίδα κωμικός, ηθοποιός, συγγραφέας, παραγωγός και εικονογράφος. Συνδημιούργησε και συμπρωταγωνίστησε στη σειρά Comedy Central Broad City (2014–2019) με την Ilana Glazer, βασισμένη στην ομώνυμη διαδικτυακή σειρά. Οι άλλοι ρόλοι της περιλαμβάνουν τη φωνή της Katie Mitchell στο The Mitchells vs. the Machines (2021), τη Nya στην ταινία The Lego Ninjago (2017) και την Princess Bean στη σειρά Disenchantment (2018–2023), όπως επίσης την εμφάνισή της στις ταινίες δράσης Person to Person (2017) και 6 Balloons (2018). Είναι συγγραφέας και συνδημιουργός της σειράς Amazon Prime A League of Their Own (2022), στην οποία πρωταγωνιστεί επίσης ως Carson Shaw, παίκτρια του μπέιζμπολ στο All-American Girls Professional Baseball League.
data.name: Άμπι Τζέικομπσον

data.biography: 艾比·雅各布森（Abbi Jacobson）是美國喜劇演員、作家、女演員、插畫家和製片人。
data.name: 艾比·雅各布森

data.biography:
Gianni Garko ist ein italienischer Schauspieler. Er spielte häufig in Italo-Western mit.

Garko wurde in der damaltinischen Stadt Zara geboren, als sie zu Italien gehörte, und ging als junger Mann nach Triest, wo er in der Theatergruppe Universe City erste Erfahrungen als Schauspieler sammelte. Während des Besuches der Accademia d’Arte Drammatica in Rom knüpfte er Kontakte zur Filmbranche, die ihm dann ab 1958 zu einer Vielzahl an Rollen, von 1966 bis 1973 vornehmlich in Italo-Western, verhalfen. Garko gelang der Durchbruch mit der Rolle des Sartana im gleichnamigen Film, die er später, mit anderen Attributen versehen, mehrere Male wiederholte und somit dem üblichen Rächer-Image der meisten Italo-Western-Helden eine neue Variante zufügte: Der sich selbst ironisierende, unfehlbare Scharfschütze. Um dieser Typisierung zu entkommen, drehte Garko auch einige Filme unter dem Pseudonym Gary Hudson. Seit dem Ende der Erfolge dieses Filmgenres sah man Garko auch in vielen anderen Genres, immer mehr in Fernsehfilmen und zuletzt (2002) in einer TV-Soap.

Im Theater hatte Garko 1958 neben Lilla Brignone unter Luchino Visconti in Veglia la mia casa, angelo gespielt. Auch seine Fernsehkarriere begann in diesem Jahr, die er vor allem gegen Ende der 1970er und in den 1980er Jahren intensivierte.

Von 1973 bis 1986 war Garko mit der Filmschauspielerin Susanna Martinková verheiratet. (Quelle: Wikipedia)

Born in Zadar, Dalmatia (then Italy, now part of Croatia), he moved to Trieste in 1948 to attend the acting school of the Piccolo Teatro di Trieste, and then to Rome to enter the Accademia nazionale d'arte drammatica. Garko began his career in the 1950s playing roles of various genres, especially in westerns and Italian-style comedies; in his later years he devoted himself to films for RAI television. He gave life to the character of Sartana (together with directors Gianfranco Parolini and later Giuliano Carnimeo), the protagonist of numerous spaghetti-westerns. In the film Il compagno don Camillo (1965) he played the character of Scamoggia, the photographer sent by the party to document the twinning.

In addition to the films he starred in, he had various television experiences. Among the many, we recall his appearance in the television series Space 1999 as astronaut Tony Cellini, in the episode entitled The Dragon's Domain (in addition to voicing Gwent in the episode The Infernal Machine in the same series), and in the television series Suspects, in the role of industrialist Martin Fisher. From 2002 to 2004 he starred in the soap opera Vivere, playing entrepreneur Pierfrancesco Moretti. He took part in a number of commercials; among others an olive oil, a wine, and finally a medicine alongside comedian Fabrizio Fontana from 1995-1997. Active now mainly as a character actor from tv
data.name: Gianni Garko

data.biography:
Gianni Garko, nato Gianni Garcovich e sporadicamente conosciuto con gli pseudonimi John Garko e Gary Hudson (Zara, 15 luglio 1935), è un attore italiano.

Nato a Zara, in Dalmazia (allora Italia, oggi parte della Croazia), si trasferì a Trieste nel 1948 per frequentare la scuola di recitazione del Piccolo Teatro di Trieste, e poi a Roma per inserirsi nell'Accademia nazionale d'arte drammatica. Garko iniziò la propria carriera negli anni cinquanta interpretando ruoli di vario genere, specialmente in film western e commedie all'italiana; negli ultimi anni si è dedicato ai film per la televisione della Rai. Diede vita al personaggio di Sartana (insieme ai registi Gianfranco Parolini e successivamente Giuliano Carnimeo), protagonista di numerosi spaghetti-western. Nel film Il compagno don Camillo (1965) interpretò il personaggio di Scamoggia, il fotografo mandato dal partito per documentare il gemellaggio.

Oltre alle pellicole di cui fu protagonista, fece varie esperienze televisive. Tra le molte, si ricorda l'apparizione nella serie televisiva Spazio 1999 nei panni dell'astronauta Tony Cellini, nell'episodio intitolato Il dominio del drago (oltre ad aver doppiato la voce di Gwent nell'episodio La macchina infernale nella medesima serie), e nella serie televisiva Sospetti, nel ruolo del industriale Martin Fisher. Dal 2002 al 2004 recitò nella soap opera Vivere, interpretando l'imprenditore Pierfrancesco Moretti. Prese parte ad alcuni spot pubblicitari; tra gli altri un olio di oliva, un vino e infine un medicinale al fianco dell'attore comico Fabrizio Fontana, nel periodo 1995-1997. Attivo ormai prevalentemente come caratterista in TV e teatro, nel 2013 fu protagonista di Song for the old man, videoclip della band Spiritual Front diretto da Carlo Roberti.
data.name: Gianni Garko

data.biography: Gianni Garko, nascut Giovanni Garcovich (Zadar, Croàcia, 15 de juliol de 1935), és un actor croat-italià retirat. Va trobar la fama com a protagonista als Spaghetti Westerns dels anys 60.

冯雷，中国铁路文工团演员。现签约北京鸿星世臻文化有限公司。

1994年因出演自己的首部由肖锋、秦竞虹联合执导的古装武侠剧《新七侠五义》，饰演赵浪进入娱乐圈；2000年因主演黑色幽默喜剧《贻笑大方》而走红。2004年因在《风流少年唐伯虎》中饰演祝枝山一角而获得更多关注。2007年主演警匪悬疑剧《黑白人生》。2009年主演的反映80年代人生活的温情剧《家常菜》。2013年主演改编自网络小说《第三种爱情》的电视剧《绝爱》。2016年主演电视剧《一马换三羊》，并出演6月9日热播腾讯独播网剧《逆袭之星途璀璨》，饰演“经纪人”肖洪。同年拿下神州租车、美团外卖两款代言。

2017年参演反腐大剧《人民的名义》，饰演赵立春之子赵瑞龙。同年，参演谍战剧《天衣无缝》  。

影视女魔头初心榜“中国十大青年电视剧编剧”评委
data.name: 冯雷

data.biography:
馮雷，中國鐵路文工團演員。現簽約北京鴻星世臻文化有限公司。

1994 年因出演自己的首部由肖鋒、秦競虹聯合執導的古裝武俠劇《新七俠五義》，飾演趙浪進入娛樂圈；2000 年因主演黑色幽默喜劇《貽笑大方》而走紅。2004 年因在《風流少年唐伯虎》中飾演祝枝山一角而獲得更多關注。2007 年主演警匪懸疑劇《黑白人生》。2009 年主演的反映 80 年代人生活的温情劇《家常菜》。2013 年主演改編自網路小説《第三種愛情》的電視劇《絕愛》。2016 年主演電視劇《一馬換三羊》，並出演 6 月 9 日熱播騰訊獨播網劇《逆襲之星途璀璨》，飾演“經紀人”肖洪。同年拿下神州租車、美團外賣兩款代言。

2017 年參演反腐大劇《人民的名義》，飾演趙立春之子趙瑞龍。同年，參演諜戰劇《天衣無縫》 。

影視女魔頭初心榜“中國十大青年電視劇編劇”評委
data.name: 馮雷

data.biography: Jack Tan is a Malaysian actor and singer.
data.name: Jack Tan

data.biography:
​From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Donald Randolph (January 5, 1906 – March 16, 1993) was a film and television actor. The actor, who appeared in Alfred Hitchcock's Topaz (1969), acted in dozens of television programs and over thirty films.

In 1950 he appeared in The Desert Hawk.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Donald Randolph, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Donald Randolph

data.biography:
Da Wikipedia, a enciclopédia livre

Donald Randolph (5 de janeiro de 1906 - 16 de março de 1993) foi um ator de cinema e televisão.

O ator, que apareceu na Topaz de Alfred Hitchcock (1969), atuou em dezenas de programas de televisão e mais de trinta filmes.  Em 1950, ele apareceu no The Desert Hawk.

Descrição acima do artigo de Wikipedia Donald Randolph, licenciado sob CC-BY-SA, lista completa de contribuidores na Wikipédia.

Donald Randolph, nascut Daniel Freeman (Ciutat del Cap, Sud-àfrica, 5 de gener de 1906 - Los Angeles, Califòrnia, 16 de març de 1993), va ser un actor de cinema, televisió i ràdio. Va actuar en desenes de drames radiofònics, programes de televisió i més de trenta pel·lícules.

Ο Rajendra Gupta είναι ένας Ινδός ηθοποιός και σκηνοθέτης του κινηματογράφου, της τηλεόρασης και του θεάτρου που είναι γνωστός για τους τηλεοπτικούς του ρόλους του Adina Beg Khan Sahib e Azam στη σειρά του 2010 των Maharaja Ranjit Singh, Pandit Jagannath στην τηλεοπτική σειρά φαντασίας Doordarshan της δεκαετίας του 1990.

Родился 15 марта 1955 года в Таллине. Заслуженный артист РСФСР (25.02.1991). Народный артист России (1.12.2008). Отец - Вячеслав Иванович Сирин (1924-1970), заслуженный артист Эстонской ССР. Мать - Вера Николаевна Фёдорова-Сирина (1925-2013), заслуженная артистка Эстонской ССР. Учился в пединституте, после 1 курса призвался на флот. Служил в авиации ВМФ в 1975-1977 годах в Реутове Московской области. В 1981 году окончил Высшее Театральное училище имени Б.В. Щукина (курс Л.В. Калиновского) и был принят в труппу Московского театра имени Ленинского Комсомола (ЛЕНКОМ). Жена - заслуженная артистка России Татьяна Рудина (род. 1959).
data.name: Александр Сирин
